Garage Forecourt.name: Garage Forecourt
Garage Forecourt.description: The asphalt is cracked and stained with decades of oil. A single, rusted gas pump stands like a sentry near the entrance. The 'Ironclad Auto' sign hums with a sickly yellow neon. To the north, the main service bay doors are open just a crack, revealing the orange glow of a work light.

examine_details.gas pump: An ancient model. The dial is stuck at $2.18. A faint scent of gasoline lingers.
examine_details.neon sign: It buzzes at a frequency that makes your teeth ache.
examine_details.oil stains: They form dark, iridescent patterns on the ground, like Rorschach tests of previous disasters.

Garage Lobby.name: Garage Lobby
Garage Lobby.description: A cramped room with wood-paneled walls and a sagging linoleum floor. A vending machine hums loudly in the corner. A thick glass partition separates the waiting area from the main shop floor.

examine_details.vending machine: Stocked with stale crackers and generic soda. The cooling fan is rattling.
examine_details.desk: Cluttered with miscellaneous invoices and work orders.

furniture.name: key_rack
furniture.description: A dusty board with several numbered hooks.

Mechanic's Office.name: Mechanic's Office
Mechanic's Office.description: A cramped room with wood-paneled walls and a thick layer of cigarette ash. A calendar on the wall is five years out of date. A police scanner crackles on the desk, interspersed with bursts of static.

furniture.name: cluttered_desk
furniture.description: Covered in old invoices, coffee rings, and cigarette ash.

Main Repair Bay.name: Main Repair Bay
Main Repair Bay.description: The shop is a cavern of steel and grease. A heavy-duty hydraulic lift dominates the center, holding up a vintage GTO. A power grinder sits on a workbench, still spinning down. Tools are scattered everywhere, and the floor is dangerously slick. An overhead compressor hose snakes along the ceiling, vibrating violently.

examine_details.hydraulic lift: An aging twin-post lift. The safety locks look rusted.
examine_details.power grinder: An angle grinder with a frayed cord. It smells of burnt carbon.
examine_details.workbench: A cluttered mess of oil filters and greasy rags.

furniture.name: workbench
furniture.description: A heavy steel table covered in grease and scattered tools.

Service Pit.name: Service Pit
Service Pit.description: A narrow concrete trench beneath the main lift. It's dark, claustrophobic, and smells of old transmission fluid.

examine_details.concrete walls: Stained black with decades of oil.

Parts Storage.name: Parts Storage
Parts Storage.description: Floor-to-ceiling shelves packed with heavy alternators, brake rotors, and tires. The overhead light is a single, bare bulb that swings gently.

examine_details.tire rack: A wall-mounted rack holding several massive truck tires. The mounting bolts are loose.

furniture.name: filing_cabinet
furniture.description: A dented metal cabinet containing old warranties and inventory logs.
